name: Akan Hyderabad
tagline: Pub | Restaurant | Corporate Event Space | Weekend Live Band Venue
description: Akan is a vibrant pub, family restaurant, corporate event space, and weekend live band venue in Hyderabad's tech corridor with stunning views of Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge.

location.address: Opp Durgam Cheruvu, Beside iLabs Gate No 7, Hyderabad
location.landmark: Opposite Durgam Cheruvu, Next to iLabs Gate 7

first_floor.name: 1st Floor - Pub / Band Area
first_floor.layout: Pub layout with high seating and tables
first_floor.features: Live bands perform here on weekends. Full floor available for big corporate parties.

second_floor.name: 2nd Floor - Semi Indoor & Outdoor
second_floor.features: Semi-indoor and outdoor seating. Family friendly.
second_floor.age_restriction: Below 21 allowed with parents. No liquor served to them (red wristband).
second_floor.view: Outdoor area with Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view

third_floor.name: 3rd Floor - Fully Outdoor
third_floor.features: Fully outdoor with vibrant and cool Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view. Perfect for families and groups.
third_floor.age_restriction: Below 21 allowed with parents. No liquor served to them (red wristband).
third_floor.view: Stunning panoramic Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge view
